_comment: Field value rules for zq-amazon-upc-autofill, checked by validate_output.py via field_rules.py. `max_length` keys are matched (substring, case-insensitive) against a field's BASE attribute name (before the first '[' or '#'); the first match wins. These are common Amazon US limits and are HEURISTIC defaults — violations are reported as WARN. A limit parsed from the template's own `accepted_values` text overrides these and is reported as ERROR (authoritative for that template). Edit freely per category/marketplace.
